tasks.next_action: Download and read the full ACTA report (DTIC ADA335225; if DTIC remains rate-limited use the MIT-hosted author paper) and the companion Protocols for Cognitive Task Analysis (DTIC ADA475456 or IHMC mirror). tasks.rationale: The queue has a central expertise-to-evaluation build but no primary-source elicitation method. ACTA directly targets tacit expert cognition through task diagrams, knowledge audits, simulation interviews, and cognitive-demand tables; the broader CTA protocol report supplies proven interview/modeling procedures and forms that can become reproducible benchmark-authoring primitives.
tasks.title: Operationalize cognitive task analysis for expert-to-benchmark transfer

tasks.next_action: Extend schemas/benchmark-bundle.schema.json and fixtures/tests with an independently versioned procedural-skill crosswalk, rubric-boundary disclosure status, typed skill/rubric/grader/tool/feedback-policy hashes, and error→verifier-feedback→repair→verification edges; document a four-condition no-skill/public-skill × independent/shared-rubric ablation and ensure private checks test consequences of public requirements rather than hidden obligations.
tasks.rationale: LH-Bench shows that observable expert workflow boundaries improve judge consistency, but its dual-use SKILL.md confounds guidance, rubric quality, and evaluator-cue leakage; the existing bundle lacks typed skill/rubric/feedback version provenance and explicit recovery links.
tasks.result: Extended benchmark bundle schema to v0.2 with independently versioned/hashed procedural skills, rubrics, graders, task/tool/harness/feedback-policy trial components; expert-procedure crosswalks; disclosure/public-basis fields; a validated no-skill/public-skill × independent/shared-rubric ablation plus optional exact-disclosure condition; and typed error→verifier-feedback→repair→verification edges. Added a hash-verified public skill fixture, an observed failed recovery chain, semantic leakage/version/recovery checks, design rationale, and 8 new tests (15 benchmark tests; 23 total). Verified Draft 2020-12 schema, fixture and skill hash, all tests, py_compile, 5 review quality checks, queue validation, and diff hygiene.
tasks.title: Add ablation-ready procedural skill and evaluation contracts
